summary: Executed backend pytest regression and frontend Playwright journey for Home, Explore, Company Detail, Compare, Skill Mapping, Analytics, Categories, and PWA baseline checks. Core API/UI integrations are working against the public preview URL.

issues: Top navigation wraps to two rows (Analytics appears on next line), reducing clean single-line enterprise nav consistency.

action_items: Fix manifest icon metadata: /frontend/public/manifest.json currently declares /icon-512.png with sizes 1024x1024; align declared size with actual asset for reliable PWA install metadata.
Adjust header layout so all primary nav items remain in a stable single line at 1920px desktop width.
critical_code_review_comments: Most data-loading pages (Home/Explore/Detail/Compare/Skill/Analytics) do not implement explicit loading/error UI states around async API calls; failures currently degrade silently and can hurt resilience.
test_credentials: File /app/memory/test_credentials.md exists but is empty. No auth flows were in scope for this run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL used: https://talent-compass-52.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend pytest suite passed 6/6. UI flows (home frame scroll, explore filter/search, detail sticky nav, compare, skill mapping, analytics, categories route) passed via automation. Remaining items are minor UX/PWA metadata refinements.
rca of the issue: PWA manifest metadata inconsistency observed: icon-512 entry points to /icon-512.png but declares 1024x1024 sizes, which can cause installability/audit inconsistencies in strict PWA validators.
